channel.title: CustomFrameSizes.com Blog
channel.description: Expert tips on custom framing, mat selection, gallery walls, and more

item.title: Common Framing Mistakes (and how to fix them)
item.description: Avoid costly framing errors. Learn how to fix measurement mistakes, mat width issues, wrong glazing choices, and hanging problems in custom picture frames.
item.author: CustomFrameSizes Team

item.title: Designing a Frame Online: What Pros Check Before Buying
item.description: Design custom frames online like a pro. Learn what to check before ordering including measurements, preview tools, material quality, and pricing transparency.
item.author: CustomFrameSizes Team

item.title: Non-Glare vs. UV: Which Glazing Do You Need?
item.description: Compare glazing options for custom frames including standard glass, acrylic, UV protection, non-glare, and museum glass. Find the right choice for your artwork.
item.author: CustomFrameSizes Team

item.title: Choosing Mat Colors: 7 Foolproof Combos
item.description: Master mat board color selection with 7 proven combinations that always work. Learn when to use white, cream, or colored mats for stunning custom frames.
item.author: CustomFrameSizes Team

item.title: Gallery Wall Layouts You Can Copy
item.description: Copy these proven gallery wall layouts for stunning results. Templates, spacing guides, and frame size combinations for symmetrical and organic arrangements.
item.author: CustomFrameSizes Team

item.title: The Case for Acrylic: Shipping-Safe, Lightweight, Clear
item.description: Why choose acrylic glazing over glass for custom frames? Discover the benefits of acrylic for shipping, weight savings, safety, and clarity in picture framing.
item.author: CustomFrameSizes Team

item.title: Photography Print Sizes Explained (and how to crop)
item.description: Master photography print sizes and aspect ratios. Learn standard photo sizes, how to crop for frames, and avoid common printing mistakes for perfect framed photos.
item.author: CustomFrameSizes Team

item.title: Shadowbox Ideas: Jerseys, Medals, Playbills, Vinyl
item.description: Creative shadowbox framing projects for 3D memorabilia. Display jerseys, medals, playbills, vinyl records, and collectibles with proper depth and mounting techniques.
item.author: CustomFrameSizes Team

item.title: Poster Framing on a Budget: Look Premium, Spend Less
item.description: Frame posters professionally without breaking the bank. Smart cost-saving tips, when to splurge vs. save, and material choices for budget-friendly custom framing.
item.author: CustomFrameSizes Team

item.title: How to Frame Kids' Art Without Losing the Originals
item.description: Preserve and display your children's artwork without damage. Digital scanning, photo reproduction, and rotating display solutions that keep originals safe.
item.author: CustomFrameSizes Team
